description: Style NoteFor the man who's smart enough to prefer quality along with a sporty feel, this pair from red tape is the right choice. Wear this with washed black jeans and your favourite T-shirt and you have the perfect off-duty ensemble to wear for a coffee date in the evening.Product DetailsLeather upper with contrasting nubuck overlay lining along the midfootStitched detailing on the toe box, midfoot and collarCentral lacing system with a slightly paadded tongue and socklinerDurable rubber outsole Material and CareLeatherClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
